R-103316 Software Development Engineer II

An established performer who consistently applies software engineering principles to business contexts, leads small, well-defined projects and continues as a supporting player on complex projects, and actively identifies inefficiencies in existing systems.

Collaborates with team members to co-develop and solve problems.

Applies formal training methods to current workload. Feels comfortable challenging authority/the status quo.
Reports clearly on current work status.
Asks challenging questions when empowered to do so.

Job Description

The Purpose of This Role

We are seeking a technically adept and proactive FHB Implementations & AE Support Engineer to join our Fidelity Health Benefits Platform (FHB) team within Workplace Investing (WI). This role is critical to ensuring the stability, reliability, and continuous improvement of our production systems. You will be part of a high-impact team responsible for managing Implements and AE ongoing support, solving complex issues, and driving enhancements that support the evolving needs of our clients and internal customers .

The Value You Deliver

As a FHB Implementations & AE Support, you’ll be empowered to ensure the stability and performance of our FHB platform, enabling seamless experiences for our customers. With a culture wired for responsiveness, collaboration, and continuous learning, you’ll have the tools and support to resolve complex issues, drive improvements, and make a significant difference every day. You will have an opportunity to demonstrate your skills and knowledge to contribute to the team’s success through the complete issue resolution cycle - analysis, monitoring, support, delivery and communication.

The Skills That Are Key To This Role

You should have foundational understanding of enterprise software systems, with hands-on experience in supporting production environments and Implementations. You’re expected to be comfortable working in fast-paced, high-availability environments and resolving issues under pressure.
Core Java & Spring Boot: Ability to debug and resolve Java-based applications. Familiarity with REST APIs, exception handling, and logging frameworks.
SQL & PostgreSQL: Proficient in writing queries, analyzing data, and identifying performance bottlenecks in relational databases.
Linux Command Line: Comfortable working in a Linux environment.
Azure: Experience with deploying and monitoring applications in Azure
Monitoring & Alerts: Use application dashboards and respond to alerts
CI/CD & DevOps: Familiarity of using build pipelines and shift left practices
Analytical Thinking: Ability to break down complex problems and identify root causes
Security & Compliance: Understand and follow secure development and support practices
Communicate clearly and effectively, especially during incident response, to keep partners informed.
Incident Management: Triage incoming incidents, perform initial diagnosis, and escalate to the appropriate teams when needed

The Skills that are Good to Have for this role

Exposure to the US healthcare Payor domain is preferred

How Your Work Impacts The Organization

As a FHB Implementations & AE Support of the Fidelity Health Technology Team, you will play a critical role in ensuring the stability, reliability, and performance of FHB platform used by our customers during Implementation and time-critical Annual Enrollment. Your work directly supports the seamless experience our users expect by proactively monitoring systems, resolving issues, and collaborating with diverse teams to drive long-term improvements. In this fast-paced, customer-focused environment, your contributions help safeguard business continuity and elevate the quality of our services.

The Expertise we’re looking for

Bachelor's degree - Degree in Computer Science, Management Information Systems with 2-4 years experience
Experience in Java, REST API, Spring Framework , SQL is a must
Experience with enterprise grade distributed application and support

At Fidelity, we are passionate about making our financial expertise broadly accessible and effective in helping people live the lives they want! We are a privately held company that places a high degree of value in creating and nurturing a work environment that attracts the best talent and reflects our commitment to our associates. We are proud of our diverse and inclusive workplace where we respect and value our associate for their unique perspectives and experiences. No laptop, smartphone, wearable device, voice-controlled gadget, flexible screen, VR device or smart car would have made it into your hands without us. KLA invents systems and solutions for the manufacturing of wafers and reticles, integrated circuits, packaging, printed circuit boards and flat panel displays. The innovative ideas and devices that are advancing humanity all begin with inspiration, research and development. KLA focuses more than average on innovation and we invest 15% of sales back into R&D. Our expert teams of physicists, engineers, data scientists and problem-solvers work together with the world’s leading technology providers to accelerate the delivery of tomorrow’s electronic devices. Life here is exciting and our teams thrive on tackling really hard problems. There is never a dull moment with us.

Job Description/Preferred Qualifications

A Junior Engineer to join our team.

Development, testing, and maintenance of software applications.

A basic understanding of JavaScript and Angular is required.

Strong problem-solving skills and a willingness to learn are essential.

Minimum Qualifications

BSc is SW Eng. or equivalent

We offer a competitive, family friendly total rewards package. We design our programs to reflect our commitment to an inclusive environment, while ensuring we provide benefits that meet the diverse needs of our employees. 

KLA is proud to be an equal opportunity employer

Be aware of potentially fraudulent job postings or suspicious recruiting activity by persons that are currently posing as KLA employees. KLA never asks for any financial compensation to be considered for an interview, to become an employee, or for equipment. Further, KLA does not work with any recruiters or third parties who charge such fees either directly or on behalf of KLA. Please ensure that you have searched KLA’s Careers website for legitimate job postings. KLA follows a recruiting process that involves multiple interviews in person or on video conferencing with our hiring managers. If you are concerned that a communication, an interview, an offer of employment, or that an employee is not legitimate, please send an email to talent.acquisition@kla.com to confirm the person you are communicating with is an employee. We take your privacy very seriously and confidentially handle your information.

Job description:

Job Description 
Role Purpose
The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
͏ 
Do
1. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities
͏ 
2. Perform coding and ensure optimal software/ module development 
Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders
͏ 
3. Status Reporting and Customer Focus on an ongoing basis with respect to project and its execution
Capturing all the requirements and clarifications from the client for better quality work
Taking feedback on the regular basis to ensure smooth and on time delivery
Participating in continuing education and training to remain current on best practices, learn new programming languages, and better assist other team members.
Consulting with engineering staff to evaluate software-hardware interfaces and develop specifications and performance requirements
Document and demonstrate solutions by developing documentation, flowcharts, layouts, diagrams, charts, code comments and clear code
Documenting very necessary details and reports in a formal way for proper understanding of software from client proposal to implementation 
Ensure good quality of interaction with customer w.r.t. e-mail content, fault report tracking, voice calls, business etiquette etc
Timely Response to customer requests and no instances of complaints either internally or externally
͏

About the job
About The Role

The Delivery Data Solutions (DDS) team is a horizontal team responsible to transform data Delivery to meaningful data to support analytics, metrics, power ML models and support KPIs for the domain teams through real time/batch processing. We lead the optimal data resource utilization and data quality for the organization. We provide visibility and standardization of core business metrics powered through the canonical data sets owned by the team. The team is the centre of excellence for data engineering practices across Uber Delivery org. The team creates efficient tools and processes to help people working on data, designs and maintains a holistic view of delivery data, and manages and optimises delivery data infrastructure resources.

What The Candidate Will Need / Bonus Points

---- What the Candidate Will Do ----

Build Data Products for business use cases - batch & real time
Metrics development for the analytical needs
Optimizations & improvements focussed on optimal resource utlization, improve SLA and adhere to the data quality standards.
Consult and advise the product engineering teams on the data engineering practices.

 Basic Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related technical field or equivalent practical experience
Experience coding using general purpose programming language (eg. Java, Python, Go, Scala)
Understanding of Data tech stack eg: Spark, Hive, Kafka
Data warehouse experience
Scripting and programming skill

 Preferred Qualifications

Masters degree in Computer Science or related technical field or equivalent practical experience
Delivery Domain Understanding

Seems like either... 

1. Chrome is already running. 
A. Close all Chrome windows and try again. 

2. Google Chrome or Chromedriver is out dated. 
A. Update browser and Chromedriver (You can run "windows-setup.bat" in /setup folder for Windows PC to update Chromedriver)! 

3. If error occurred when using "stealth_mode", try reinstalling undetected-chromedriver. 
A. Open a terminal and use commands "pip uninstall undetected-chromedriver" and "pip install undetected-chromedriver". 


If issue persists, try Safe Mode. Set, safe_mode = True in config.py

About the job
Overview

This role is ideal for those at the start of their professional journey, with less than two years of industry experience who are eager to learn, grow, and make an immediate impact. As this is a general posting, we’ll align you with a team based on your skills, interests, and career aspirations to set you up for success.

We're cultivating a culture that prioritizes innovators, risk-takers, and imaginative thinkers. You’ll help create solutions that transform how millions of consumers and small businesses manage their finances in cloud, platform, mobile, and SaaS environments. Working in a culture that embraces experimentation and rapid prototyping, you’ll collaborate closely with customers and cross-functional teams, turning ideas into real impact while building the skills to launch a rewarding career.

Responsibilities

Frontend Engineering:

Experience developing scalable, responsive, and dynamic web-based applications
Familiarity with modern frontend tools and frameworks such as React, AngularJS, or Vue.js
Knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript standards
Strong ability to collaborate with designers, UX specialists, and backend engineers

Backend Engineering

Experience developing web applications using server-side languages, such as Java, Python, or Node.js.
Familiarity with database technologies such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, or MongoDB
Understanding of RESTful API design principles and ability to work with API integrations
Experience with server frameworks such as Express, Spring MVC or Django

Fullstack Engineering

Familiarity with both frontend and backend development
Ability to work effectively with developers and designers, discussing application and API architectures
Understanding of Agile methodologies and ability to work with Scrum teams
Familiarity with tools such as Git, Jenkins, or Travis

Mobile Engineering

Experience developing applications for one or more platforms such as Android and iOS
Familiarity with mobile application development frameworks such as React Native or Flutter
Understanding of development tools such as XCode, Android Studio and SDK languages such as Objective-C, Swift or Java
Ability to work with designers and backend engineers to integrate mobile applications with cloud-based APIs

Across All Tech Stacks

Contribute to our core products and services, as well as systems that power critical engineering operations.
See your work launched and help solve meaningful problems for customers.
Learn and apply proven best practices in designing, building, and supporting software projects.
Receive hands-on guidance, detailed feedback, and mentorship from experienced team members.
Collaborate closely with peers across disciplines and build strong, supportive working relationships.

Qualifications

Qualifications

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
Foundational understanding of Agile development, object-oriented design, and programming principles.
Coursework, internships, personal projects, or academic experience with one or more programming languages (e.g., Java, Python, JavaScript, C++, etc.).
Basic knowledge of front-end web technologies (e.g., HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and familiarity with frameworks or tools is a plus.
Strong written, verbal, and collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively in a team environment.
Awareness of AI concepts and a basic understanding of capabilities like Generative AI.
Willingness to learn and adapt to new priorities, tools, and technologies in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

Intuit provides a competitive compensation package with a strong pay for performance rewards approach. This position will be eligible for a cash bonus, equity rewards and benefits, in accordance with our applicable plans and programs (see more about our compensation and benefits at Intuit®: Careers | Benefits). Pay offered is based on factors such as job-related knowledge, skills, experience, and work location. To drive ongoing fair pay for employees, Intuit conducts regular comparisons across categories of ethnicity and gender.

Job Description:
About the job
About Us
Screen Andragogy Platforms is a technology management solutions company for the screen industries. We empower industry professionals, organizations, and educational institutions with tools and data-driven insights. Committed to innovation, we leverage advanced analytics to uncover actionable intelligence that drives success across every stage of the creative process. From analyzing market trends and audience preferences to optimizing production and distribution strategies, our research provides unparalleled depth to inform strategic decision-making.
Job Overview
Role: Junior Full Stack AI Engineer (AI Coding Focus)
We are seeking a proactive, product-minded Full Stack AI Product Engineer to join our team. This role sits at the intersection of AI product strategy, vibe coding, growth experimentation, AI agents, and full-stack execution.
You will help conceptualize, prototype, test, and scale AI-powered products for the media and entertainment ecosystem. This is not a conventional engineering role it is a builder role with strong product intuition, rapid execution, and ownership over AI-driven workflows. Successful completion may lead to a permanent role.
Key Responsibilities
AI Product & Strategy
Translate business and industry problems into AI-powered product features and workflows.
Define AI use cases, product scope, MVPs, and iteration roadmaps.
Collaborate with founders and stakeholders on AI product vision, positioning, and growth strategy.
Vibe Coding & Rapid Prototyping
Practice vibe coding: rapid iteration, experimentation, and shipping usable prototypes fast.
Build proof-of-concepts using modern AI stacks rather than overengineering early solutions.
Balance speed, functionality, and user experience while validating product-market fit.
Full Stack Development
Build end-to-end applications:
Frontend: React, Tailwind CSS, HTML/CSS
Backend: Node.js, Python, APIs, databases
Integrate AI agents and automation workflows into core product features.
AI Agents & Prompt Engineering
Design, build, and optimize AI agents for research, content, analytics, and automation.
Develop and maintain prompt libraries, smart prompts, and agent logic.
Implement workflows using LLMs, retrieval systems, and orchestration frameworks.
Continuously improve prompts for accuracy, efficiency, and user outcomes.
AI Integration
Integrate NLP, ML models, and LLM APIs (OpenAI, Hugging Face, etc.).
Assist in deploying AI features such as:
AI assistants
Smart recommendations
Automated analysis and insights
Work closely with data and AI specialists to ensure scalability and reliability.
Growth & Experimentation
Support growth strategies through feature experimentation and user feedback loops.
Analyze usage patterns to optimize onboarding, engagement, and retention.
Assist in A/B testing, feature validation, and iteration cycles.
UX/UI & Product Experience
Collaborate on user journeys, wireframes, and interaction design.
Ensure AI features feel intuitive, explainable, and valuable.
Balance aesthetics with functional product thinking.
Testing, QA & Performance
Write automated tests (unit, integration, end-to-end).
Ensure quality, reliability, and performance of AI-powered systems.
Debug, optimize, and scale applications efficiently.
Media & Entertainment Domain Application
Apply knowledge of the screen industries to product design and AI use cases.
What You’ll Learn
AI-first product thinking and AI Product Management.
Building and scaling AI agents and prompt-driven systems.
Rapid prototyping through vibe coding methodologies.
Growth-oriented product development and experimentation.
Full-stack AI systems used in real-world media and entertainment workflows.
Industry-grade testing, QA, and deployment practices.
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Design, or equivalent experience.
Strong fundamentals in front-end development (React, JS, Tailwind, HTML/CSS).
Proficiency in Node.js and Python, especially for AI-driven workflows.
Interest in AI products, LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI agents.
Product-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving skills.
Familiarity with UX/UI design principles and tools (Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD).
Curiosity about the media & entertainment industry and its evolving tech stack.
Comfort with fast iteration, experimentation, and ambiguity.
Bonus Skills (Highly Valued)
AI tools: OpenAI APIs, Hugging Face, LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, or similar agent frameworks.
Experience with prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, or AI orchestration.
Growth experimentation, metrics, and analytics experience.
Automated testing tools (Jest, Cypress, Pytest).
Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and CI/CD pipelines.
Prior experience as:
AI Product Manager
Full Stack AI Engineer
AI Prototyper
zero-to-one product builder
Application Process
Creative Product Test
Objective:
Build a small AI-powered product or feature that solves a real problem in the media or entertainment ecosystem. Strong emphasis on:
Product thinking
UX/UI
AI agents or prompt-based workflows
Timeframe: 2 hours
Evaluation Criteria:
Product intuition, originality, AI usage, UX, clarity, and execution.
Technical + Product Thinking Test+behavioural Round
Short challenges assessing:
Full-stack implementation
Python & AI integration
Prompt engineering & agent logic
AI Analytics
Growth Strategies
Timeframe: 2 hours
Mandatory Policy
🛑 No direct full-time employment is offered at the outset.
✅ All selected candidates must first complete a minimum 3-6 months Sap impact Fellowship or consulting engagement.
🌍 Willingness to travel with the company for at least 1–2 years is mandatory. This ensures:
Cultural alignment across global markets
Real-time collaboration with clients and project stakeholders
Post successful completion of this phase, candidates may be considered for full-time roles, based strictly on:Value creation ,Strategic alignment,Contribution to the Screen Andragogy Platforms ecosystem
Important Note: Impact fellowship vs Project-Based Consulting Engagement
We follow a strict engagement structure based on the academic stage of the applicant to ensure seriousness, fairness, and real industry alignment.

Impact fellowship are offered only to undergraduate students in:
1st year
2nd year
3rd year
These Imapct Fellowship are designed for:
Early exposure to AI, product development, and industry workflows

Final-Year Undergraduate & Postgraduate Policy

Nature of the Engagement
You will join as a Project Consultant,
You will work on live AI products, platforms, and internal systems
You will be assigned clearly defined deliverables, milestones, and timelines
Output is expected to be production-quality, not academic or experimental
The role mirrors AI product team standards, including ownership and accountability
This model is rigorous, execution-driven, and performance-evaluated.
Why We Do Not Offer Impact fellowship at This Level
Final-year undergraduate and postgraduate candidates are expected to:
Demonstrate professional-level capability
Work independently with minimal supervision
Contribute meaningful value to core products and AI workflows
Be evaluated as potential full-time hires, not trainees
Impact fellowship do not meet these expectations and therefore are not suitable for this level.

About Us
Screen Andragogy Platforms is a technology management solutions company for the screen industries. We empower industry professionals, organizations, and educational institutions with tools and data-driven insights. Job Overview
Role: Junior Full Stack AI Engineer (AI Coding Focus)
We are seeking a proactive, product-minded Full Stack AI Product Engineer to join our team. This role sits at the intersection of AI product strategy, vibe coding, growth experimentation, AI agents, and full-stack execution.
You will help conceptualize, prototype, test, and scale AI-powered products for the media and entertainment ecosystem. This is not a conventional engineering role it is a builder role with strong product intuition, rapid execution, and ownership over AI-driven workflows. Successful completion may lead to a permanent role.
Key Responsibilities
AI Product & Strategy
Translate business and industry problems into AI-powered product features and workflows.
Define AI use cases, product scope, MVPs, and iteration roadmaps.
Collaborate with founders and stakeholders on AI product vision, positioning, and growth strategy.
Vibe Coding & Rapid Prototyping
Practice vibe coding: rapid iteration, experimentation, and shipping usable prototypes fast.
Build proof-of-concepts using modern AI stacks rather than overengineering early solutions.
Balance speed, functionality, and user experience while validating product-market fit.
Full Stack Development
Build end-to-end applications:
Frontend: React, Tailwind CSS, HTML/CSS
Backend: Node.js, Python, APIs, databases
Integrate AI agents and automation workflows into core product features.
AI Agents & Prompt Engineering
Design, build, and optimize AI agents for research, content, analytics, and automation.
Develop and maintain prompt libraries, smart prompts, and agent logic.
Implement workflows using LLMs, retrieval systems, and orchestration frameworks.
Continuously improve prompts for accuracy, efficiency, and user outcomes.
AI Integration
Integrate NLP, ML models, and LLM APIs (OpenAI, Hugging Face, etc.).
Assist in deploying AI features such as:
AI assistants
Smart recommendations
Automated analysis and insights
Work closely with data and AI specialists to ensure scalability and reliability.
Growth & Experimentation
Support growth strategies through feature experimentation and user feedback loops.
Analyze usage patterns to optimize onboarding, engagement, and retention.
Assist in A/B testing, feature validation, and iteration cycles.
UX/UI & Product Experience
Collaborate on user journeys, wireframes, and interaction design.
Ensure AI features feel intuitive, explainable, and valuable.
Balance aesthetics with functional product thinking.
Testing, QA & Performance
Write automated tests (unit, integration, end-to-end).
Ensure quality, reliability, and performance of AI-powered systems.
Debug, optimize, and scale applications efficiently.
Media & Entertainment Domain Application
Apply knowledge of the screen industries to product design and AI use cases.
What You’ll Learn
AI-first product thinking and AI Product Management.
Building and scaling AI agents and prompt-driven systems.
Rapid prototyping through vibe coding methodologies.
Growth-oriented product development and experimentation.
Full-stack AI systems used in real-world media and entertainment workflows.
Industry-grade testing, QA, and deployment practices.
Requirements

Strong fundamentals in front-end development (React, JS, Tailwind, HTML/CSS).
Proficiency in Node.js and Python, especially for AI-driven workflows.
Interest in AI products, LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI agents.
Product-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving skills.

Prior experience as:

zero-to-one product builder

About the job
CAD Engineer/Product Designer/3D Artist for design & manufacture of artificial part of Face

Join the Future of Head & Neck Prosthetics,Reconstruction & Rehabilitation

Enhance Head Neck Rehabilitation,Pune is a Centre of Excellence transforming lives through advanced maxillofacial prosthetics and precision-driven reconstructive care. 

We integrate clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology — digital workflows, CAD design, and 3D printing — to deliver highly personalized, life-changing outcomes. From accurate jaw reconstructions to pioneering remote facial prosthetic solutions, we collaborate with leading international centres to expand access to specialized care.

Our vision is bold:
To democratize high-quality rehabilitation through a scalable hub-and-spoke model, bringing world-class care closer to patients everywhere.
If you are driven by innovation, precision, and purpose, and want to build something meaningful in reconstructive and rehabilitative healthcare — we would love to have you in our team

Requirement
CAD Engineer /Product Designer/3D Artist

About the Role:

We are looking for a creative and technically skilled individual to assist in 3D modeling, digital content creation, and social media media design. The ideal candidate should be passionate about combining art and technology — from sculpting 3D models to creating engaging visual content for online platforms.

'Must Have' Skills
3D Modeling with Blender,ZBrush

'Good to Have' Skills
Video editing, Designing promotional collaterals, social media

'Nice to Have' Skills
Ability to use AI tools to enhance productivity

Key Responsibilities:

Create and modify 3D models using Blender (knowledge of sculpting is a major plus) or similar software.

Assist in photo editing, poster design, and video editing for social media and marketing materials.

Support the team in developing visual concepts and showcase presentations for internal and external use.

Manage and publish content across social media platforms (Instagram, YouTube, etc.).

(Preferred) Utilize AI tools or automation assistants (such as Lovable, Replit, or similar AI agents) to optimize creative workflows.

Collaborate with doctors, designers, and developers to integrate 3D and media assets into projects.

Required Skills:

Strong knowledge of 3D Modeling and Sculpting (Blender preferred).

Experience with Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, or equivalent tools.

Basic understanding of lighting, rendering, and texturing in 3D workflows.

Good sense of design aesthetics and visual storytelling.

Added Advantage:

Knowledge of AI tools, automation agents, or any programming/scripting language (Python, JavaScript, etc.).

Prior experience in medical visualization, prosthetic design, or 3D printing workflows.

Qualification:

Diploma / Bachelor’s in Engineering,Animation, Multimedia, 3D Design, or a related creative field.

Freshers with strong portfolios are welcome.

Remuneration:

Competitive and based on experience & skill level.

How to Apply:

Send your portfolio and resume to info@ehnrin.com
Please include links to your 3D models, video edits, or AI projects (if any).

About the job
About The Company

Our client is a Singapore-headquartered AI-native data & service platform delivering cyber, digital, and risk solutions across Asia. They help essential service enterprises make responsible decisions through the collective intelligence of humans and machines.

AI is embedded in how they build and run systems — but humans remain accountable.

The Role

This is not a traditional frontend role.

You own the interaction layer where AI systems meet human judgment. Your responsibility is to ensure interfaces are clear, accessible, interpretable, and never misleading — especially in high-stakes environments.

You Operate With

Build focus: Product — apps, APIs, interaction layers
Run focus: Present — how outcomes are delivered, explained, and consumed, you are accountable for preventing overconfident or ambiguous UX in AI-assisted workflows.

What You’ll DoProduct & Interaction Ownership

Build and evolve interaction flows across web platforms
Own UX correctness, clarity, and accessibility
Design interfaces that communicate uncertainty appropriately
Ensure performance and resilient UI architecture

AI-Assisted Engineering

Use AI to generate UI components, copy, and interaction logic
Generate and expand UI test coverage with AI
Explore edge cases and ambiguous behaviour
Review and approve all AI-generated outputs 

CI/CD & Operational Discipline

Participate in CI pipelines for UI testing
Own frontend test coverage and performance budgets
Respect structured deployment workflows
Understand rollout behaviour and production impact

Shipping is expected. Shipping safely is designed.

What We’re Looking For

Strong experience with modern frontend frameworks (React, Next.js or similar)
Deep understanding of interaction design & accessibility (WCAG)
Experience building complex, state-driven interfaces
Strong UI testing and performance optimisation experience
Comfortable working in AI-augmented engineering workflows
High ownership mindset and strong product judgment

Why This Role Is Different

AI-native engineering model (build + run integrated)
Human-in-the-loop accountability is intentional
Interfaces are treated as responsibility surfaces
Safety, clarity, and interpretability matter

This role is for engineers who want to shape how intelligent systems communicate — clearly, responsibly, and under pressure.

About the job
Company Description
 
Credshell is revolutionizing the payment industry with the world's first Pre-Payment Shield, designed to protect transactions in real-time before any funds are transferred. Unlike conventional post-fraud recovery solutions, Credshell deploys advanced behavioral telemetry, SIM-metric verification, and API-driven risk scoring to assess and neutralize threats within milliseconds. Our technology ensures enhanced security for every financial interaction, from QR codes to UPI IDs and payment links. 
Credshell functions as an intelligent firewall for your financial ecosystem, effectively preventing cyber-criminal activities before they even begin.

 Role Description
 
This is a full-time remote role for a Mobile Application Developer. The role involves designing, developing, testing, and maintaining mobile applications with a focus on user experience, performance, and reliability. The developer will collaborate with cross-functional teams, integrate robust APIs, and implement object-oriented principles to build innovative and secure apps for both iOS and Android platforms. Optimizing applications for performance and ensuring seamless user interactions will also be key responsibilities.

 Qualifications
Proficiency in Mobile Application Development and working experience in Mobile Applications.
Strong knowledge of UI, UX and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles and their application in development.
Practical expertise in Android and iOS Development and delivering apps.
Experience with Application Development, including designing, coding, debugging, and deploying mobile solutions.
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a remote team environment.
Familiarity with API integration and technologies that enhance mobile application security is a plus.

Job Description:
About the job
About Us
Screen Andragogy Platforms is a technology management solutions company for the screen industries. We empower industry professionals, organizations, and educational institutions with tools and data-driven insights. Committed to innovation, we leverage advanced analytics to uncover actionable intelligence that drives success across every stage of the creative process. From analyzing market trends and audience preferences to optimizing production and distribution strategies, our research provides unparalleled depth to inform strategic decision-making.
Job Overview
Role: Junior Full Stack AI Engineer (AI Coding Focus)
We are seeking a proactive, product-minded Full Stack AI Product Engineer to join our team. This role sits at the intersection of AI product strategy, vibe coding, growth experimentation, AI agents, and full-stack execution.
You will help conceptualize, prototype, test, and scale AI-powered products for the media and entertainment ecosystem. This is not a conventional engineering role it is a builder role with strong product intuition, rapid execution, and ownership over AI-driven workflows. Successful completion may lead to a permanent role.
Key Responsibilities
AI Product & Strategy
Translate business and industry problems into AI-powered product features and workflows.
Define AI use cases, product scope, MVPs, and iteration roadmaps.
Collaborate with founders and stakeholders on AI product vision, positioning, and growth strategy.
Vibe Coding & Rapid Prototyping
Practice vibe coding: rapid iteration, experimentation, and shipping usable prototypes fast.
Build proof-of-concepts using modern AI stacks rather than overengineering early solutions.
Balance speed, functionality, and user experience while validating product-market fit.
Full Stack Development
Build end-to-end applications:
Frontend: React, Tailwind CSS, HTML/CSS
Backend: Node.js, Python, APIs, databases
Integrate AI agents and automation workflows into core product features.
AI Agents & Prompt Engineering
Design, build, and optimize AI agents for research, content, analytics, and automation.
Develop and maintain prompt libraries, smart prompts, and agent logic.
Implement workflows using LLMs, retrieval systems, and orchestration frameworks.
Continuously improve prompts for accuracy, efficiency, and user outcomes.
AI Integration
Integrate NLP, ML models, and LLM APIs (OpenAI, Hugging Face, etc.).
Assist in deploying AI features such as:
AI assistants
Smart recommendations
Automated analysis and insights
Work closely with data and AI specialists to ensure scalability and reliability.
Growth & Experimentation
Support growth strategies through feature experimentation and user feedback loops.
Analyze usage patterns to optimize onboarding, engagement, and retention.
Assist in A/B testing, feature validation, and iteration cycles.
UX/UI & Product Experience
Collaborate on user journeys, wireframes, and interaction design.
Ensure AI features feel intuitive, explainable, and valuable.
Balance aesthetics with functional product thinking.
Testing, QA & Performance
Write automated tests (unit, integration, end-to-end).
Ensure quality, reliability, and performance of AI-powered systems.
Debug, optimize, and scale applications efficiently.
Media & Entertainment Domain Application
Apply knowledge of the screen industries to product design and AI use cases.
What You’ll Learn
AI-first product thinking and AI Product Management.
Building and scaling AI agents and prompt-driven systems.
Rapid prototyping through vibe coding methodologies.
Growth-oriented product development and experimentation.
Full-stack AI systems used in real-world media and entertainment workflows.
Industry-grade testing, QA, and deployment practices.
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Design, or equivalent experience.
Strong fundamentals in front-end development (React, JS, Tailwind, HTML/CSS).
Proficiency in Node.js and Python, especially for AI-driven workflows.
Interest in AI products, LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI agents.
Product-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving skills.
Familiarity with UX/UI design principles and tools (Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD).
Curiosity about the media & entertainment industry and its evolving tech stack.
Comfort with fast iteration, experimentation, and ambiguity.
Bonus Skills (Highly Valued)
AI tools: OpenAI APIs, Hugging Face, LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, or similar agent frameworks.
Experience with prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, or AI orchestration.
Growth experimentation, metrics, and analytics experience.
Automated testing tools (Jest, Cypress, Pytest).
Cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and CI/CD pipelines.
Prior experience as:
AI Product Manager
Full Stack AI Engineer
AI Prototyper
zero-to-one product builder
Application Process
Creative Product Test
Objective:
Build a small AI-powered product or feature that solves a real problem in the media or entertainment ecosystem. Strong emphasis on:
Product thinking
UX/UI
AI agents or prompt-based workflows
Timeframe: 2 hours
Evaluation Criteria:
Product intuition, originality, AI usage, UX, clarity, and execution.
Technical + Product Thinking Test+behavioural Round
Short challenges assessing:
Full-stack implementation
Python & AI integration
Prompt engineering & agent logic
AI Analytics
Growth Strategies
Timeframe: 2 hours
Mandatory Policy
🛑 No direct full-time employment is offered at the outset.
✅ All selected candidates must first complete a minimum 3-6 months Sap impact Fellowship or consulting engagement.
🌍 Willingness to travel with the company for at least 1–2 years is mandatory. This ensures:
Cultural alignment across global markets
Real-time collaboration with clients and project stakeholders
Post successful completion of this phase, candidates may be considered for full-time roles, based strictly on:Value creation ,Strategic alignment,Contribution to the Screen Andragogy Platforms ecosystem
Important Note: Impact fellowship vs Project-Based Consulting Engagement
We follow a strict engagement structure based on the academic stage of the applicant to ensure seriousness, fairness, and real industry alignment.
Impact fellowship Eligibility (Undergraduate Only – Early Years)
Impact fellowship are offered only to undergraduate students in:
1st year
2nd year
3rd year
These Imapct Fellowship are designed for:
Early exposure to AI, product development, and industry workflows
Learning-focused participation under supervision
Limited responsibility and structured guidance
Final-Year Undergraduate & Postgraduate Policy
For the following candidates:
Final-year undergraduate students (4th year or equivalent)
Postgraduate students (any year)
Recent graduates
Project-Based Consulting Engagement (Mandatory for Final-Year & Above)
Eligible candidates from the above categories will be onboarded through a Project-Based Consulting Engagement instead of an impact fellowship
Nature of the Engagement
You will join as a Project Consultant,
You will work on live AI products, platforms, and internal systems
You will be assigned clearly defined deliverables, milestones, and timelines
Output is expected to be production-quality, not academic or experimental
The role mirrors AI product team standards, including ownership and accountability
This model is rigorous, execution-driven, and performance-evaluated.
Why We Do Not Offer Impact fellowship at This Level
Final-year undergraduate and postgraduate candidates are expected to:
Demonstrate professional-level capability
Work independently with minimal supervision
Contribute meaningful value to core products and AI workflows
Be evaluated as potential full-time hires, not trainees
Impact fellowship do not meet these expectations and therefore are not suitable for this level.
Evaluation & Outcomes
All project-based consultants are evaluated continuously on:
AI product thinking and execution
Full-stack and AI agent implementation
Prompt engineering and workflow design
UX/UI sensibility
Speed, quality, and reliability of delivery
Based on performance:
Top performers may be offered permanent full-time roles
Others exit with verifiable, real-world project credentials
Performance-based references are provided where applicable
How to Apply
Submit your Video resume, portfolio, GitHub, and AI/LLM projects via LinkedIn.
We’re looking for builders who can think in products, ship fast, and harness AI creatively to shape the future of the screen industries
Note: Screen Andragogy Platforms is not a traditional IT company. We build technology and AI products for the screen and entertainment industries.This is not Traditional 9-to-5 role. We are not looking for candidates who want to work like traditional tech or IT companies.This role is for builders who are genuinely interested in film, music, gaming, and the screen industries, and who want to work at the intersection of technology and creativity.

About the job
We're looking for Software Development Engineers!

Responsibilities

Code critical sections and key features of the product. Lead and solve key technical challenges in the overall system.
Work in collaboration with architects to write low-level design documents and to create a technical roadmap.

About the job
Total Open Positions: 15

Company Description
Seceon provides enterprises, MSPs, and MSSPs with an advanced cybersecurity platform built to identify, respond to, and resolve threats in real time. The platform combines key security capabilities such as SIEM, SOAR, UEBA, EDR, NDR, Threat Intelligence, Vulnerability Management, and Compliance within a single AI-driven solution. This unified approach delivers complete visibility across the security environment while enabling automated threat detection and response.

Designed for large-scale environments, the platform can process more than 10 million events per second and supports continuous compliance with major regulatory standards including NIST, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS. Organizations rely on Seceon to strengthen their security posture, reduce cybersecurity costs by up to 60%, and quickly stop threats using AI-powered automation. With comprehensive situational awareness and proactive threat management, Seceon is helping shape the future of efficient and intelligent cybersecurity.

Role Description
This is a full-time remote role for a Software Engineer. The Software Engineer will design, develop, test, and maintain backend systems and software applications that drive Seceon’s cybersecurity platform. Daily responsibilities include implementing software solutions, writing efficient code, debugging, and participating in code reviews. This role involves working closely with cross-functional teams to ensure the delivery of high-quality and scalable software solutions that meet client requirements and business objectives.

Qualifications

Proficiency in one or more programming languages such as Java, Python, or C++.
Knowledge of cloud computing and scalable systems architecture is a plus.
Bachelor’s or higher degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
Ability to work independently in a collaborative, remote team environment.
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail, with a focus on delivering innovative software solutions.

Visit: https://seceon.com/careers/

Trying to Apply to "Founding AI/ML Engineer | Kickker A" job. Job ID: 4384941277
HR info was not given for "Founding AI/ML Engineer" with Job ID: 4384941277!

About the job
About Kickker AI

We are building a new breed of AI that transforms how B2B companies sell and procure. Our agents (1) conduct autonomous product demos in real-time, (2) understand and qualify buyer intent, (3) reason and adapt across complex sales conversations, and (4) are AI native and support agent-to-agent interactions.

We are currently working at the intersection of voice AI and browser automation and plan to build multimodal action models. 

About this Role

We believe the next generation of sales intelligence will be powered by models trained on rich, behavioral interaction data and that synthetic data is a critical lever to get there faster. We're looking for a Founding AI/ML Engineer/Scientist to be the first member of our AI/ML team and set the technical foundation for everything we build.

The conversational and behavioral signals such as voice, language and action sequences are a rich source of data reflecting how real sales interactions unfold, and our models need to process these signals to: (a) understand the current state of a buyer conversation, (b) predict what a buyer needs next and how they will respond, and (c) plan and execute multi-step demo sequences that adapt in real time.

You will work closely with the founders focussing on:

Designing and running end-to-end ML experiments rapidly, from hypothesis to evaluation to production decision, often within a single week
Building synthetic data pipelines to generate high-quality training data for conversation quality, lead qualification, and demo execution models
Adapting and fine-tuning foundation models (LLMs and voice models) to our domain using synthetic data, self-instruct, distillation, and RLHF techniques
Have knowledge of vision models to support browser automation.
Developing evaluation frameworks that reliably measure model quality on both synthetic and real-world distributions
Owning scalable infrastructure for data preprocessing, experiment tracking, model versioning, and deployment
Sitting in on live sales calls and customer sessions to ground your research in real-world signal

Minimum Qualifications:

• Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science, ML, or a related field
• Proficiency in Python and the modern LLM ecosystem (Hugging Face, OpenAI/Anthropic APIs, LangChain or equivalent)
• Ability to design, run, and analyze ML experiments independently, managing multiple research threads in parallel
• Understanding of ML fundamentals and experience with large-scale training, and GPU/TPU-based compute environments.
• Comfort operating as a solo contributor where you can own the full ML lifecycle without a team around you

Preferred Qualifications:

• Strong track record of building and deploying high-performance ML models to production (not just notebooks)
• Experience with synthetic data generation techniques such as self-instruct, distillation, RLHF pipelines, or data quality filtering
• Experience fine-tuning or adapting foundation models on domain-specific datasets
• Proficiency in PyTorch/Tensorflow, especially for distributed training and efficient inference
• Experience in a 0 to 1 environment: early-stage startup, research lab, or internal projects
• Familiarity with conversational AI, voice and vision models, and multi-agent systems

Compensation: Equity-only (up to 5%) with a pre-negotiated salary that activates on close of our funding round. You know the number before you sign.

About the job
We're Civica and we make software that helps deliver critical services for citizens all around the world. From local to state government, to education, to health and care, over 5,000 public bodies across the globe use our software to help provide critical services to over 100 million citizens. 
Our aspiration is to be a GovTech champion everywhere we work around the globe, supporting the needs of citizens and those that serve them every day. Building on 21 years of continuous growth and success, we're at a pivotal point on our journey to realise that aspiration. 
As a company, we're passionate about what we do and the citizens we help to serve. If you too would like to help champion the use of technology in public services, to improve outcomes for citizens and public sector organisations, then Civica is the right place for you. We will help you unlock the best version of yourself, achieve growth in your career whilst making a real difference to people and communities. 
Why you'll love this role as Salesforce Test engineer at Civica
We are looking for a Salesforce test engineer with extensive experience in all aspects of the Salesforce platform, who is enthusiastic about joining a diverse software organization. 
The Salesforce test engineer will collaborate with the Salesforce team to ensure that projects are thoroughly tested and delivered in alignment with business requirements, overseeing the entire process from requirements gathering through design and development to QA and final release deployment. 
Responsibilities will span various squads, sprints, and Salesforce clouds (Sales, Support, Experience). 
This role involves addressing challenges and issues, managing solutions, implementing corrective actions, documenting lessons learned, and gathering and sharing pertinent information. This position also contributes to the development and enhancement of relationships with customers and stakeholders.
Define the scope of different types of testing (like Database Testing, Accessibility Testing, Compatibility Testing, APIs) and provide expert support and hands on testing. 
Identify the scope of NFRs early in the stage and start taking required actions. 
Complete the testing tasks assigned within a sprint, manual or automated, on time with minimum rework or defects. 
Participate in Daily scrum and track the existing status again the actual Progress. 
Produce test deliverables, Test Plans and Test Outcome Reports 
Proactively pursue enhancements and increased efficiencies in processes.

Requirements

What you will need to be successful in this role
Strong well developed testing skills and in-depth knowledge of current testing techniques across the test phases. Manual and automated testing will be required. 
Experience of different types of testing such as;- System Testing (Functional Testing), Systems Integration Testing ,Regression, UAT, Database API, Accessibility, Compatibility 
Has understanding of Automation and Non-Functional Testing to help in planning and Governence. 
Good in oral and written communication skills and able to take part in meetings and discussions. 
A proactive individual who is capable of working independently and is also an effective team player.
Capable of operating at both detailed and abstract levels.
Proven ability to meet deadlines while maintaining high quality standards.
Applicants should possess at least 3 years of relevant experience.
Mandatory Skills
Test Management-- 3+ years
Test Planning and Estimation-- 3+ years
Salesforce --3+ years
Fundamentals Non Functional Testing-- 2+ years 
Hands-on manual and automated Functional testing --3+ years 
Database Testing --1+ years 
API Testing --2+ years 
Stakeholder Management --2+ years 
Agile Concepts --3+ years 
Working knowledge of Azure DevOps-- 2+ years 

Benefits

Why you'll love working with us 
We know that when our people are happy, they will work better and have greater work satisfaction. Here's what you can expect: 
We're all different - and we love this about us. 
We provide an inclusive, safe, and welcoming environment to all Civicans - there are heaps of opportunities to enable you to grow and be your best. 
Giving culture - we encourage you to "give back" with benefits such as our Days of Difference leave where you can volunteer for a charity of your choice. 
Flexible Work - Flexible work - we have the technology and tools to support you to work from home and come into our offices now and then to catch up and socialise with colleagues.

We're Civica and we make software that helps deliver critical services for citizens all around the world. From local to state government, to education, to health and care, over 5,000 public bodies across the globe use our software to help provide critical services to over 100 million citizens. 
Our aspiration is to be a GovTech champion everywhere we work around the globe, supporting the needs of citizens and those that serve them every day. Building on 21 years of continuous growth and success, we're at a pivotal point on our journey to realise that aspiration. 
As a company, we're passionate about what we do and the citizens we help to serve. If you too would like to help champion the use of technology in public services, to improve outcomes for citizens and public sector organisations, then Civica is the right place for you. We will help you unlock the best version of yourself, achieve growth in your career whilst making a real difference to people and communities. 
Why you'll love this role as Salesforce Test engineer at Civica
We are looking for a Salesforce test engineer with extensive experience in all aspects of the Salesforce platform, who is enthusiastic about joining a diverse software organization. 
The Salesforce test engineer will collaborate with the Salesforce team to ensure that projects are thoroughly tested and delivered in alignment with business requirements, overseeing the entire process from requirements gathering through design and development to QA and final release deployment. 
Responsibilities will span various squads, sprints, and Salesforce clouds (Sales, Support, Experience). 
This role involves addressing challenges and issues, managing solutions, implementing corrective actions, documenting lessons learned, and gathering and sharing pertinent information. This position also contributes to the development and enhancement of relationships with customers and stakeholders.
Define the scope of different types of testing (like Database Testing, Accessibility Testing, Compatibility Testing, APIs) and provide expert support and hands on testing. 
Identify the scope of NFRs early in the stage and start taking required actions. 
Complete the testing tasks assigned within a sprint, manual or automated, on time with minimum rework or defects. 
Participate in Daily scrum and track the existing status again the actual Progress. 
Produce test deliverables, Test Plans and Test Outcome Reports 
Proactively pursue enhancements and increased efficiencies in processes.

Requirements

What you will need to be successful in this role
Strong well developed testing skills and in-depth knowledge of current testing techniques across the test phases. Manual and automated testing will be required. 
Experience of different types of testing such as;- System Testing (Functional Testing), Systems Integration Testing ,Regression, UAT, Database API, Accessibility, Compatibility 
Has understanding of Automation and Non-Functional Testing to help in planning and Governence. 
Good in oral and written communication skills and able to take part in meetings and discussions. 
A proactive individual who is capable of working independently and is also an effective team player.
Capable of operating at both detailed and abstract levels.
Proven ability to meet deadlines while maintaining high quality standards.
Applicants should possess at least 3 years of relevant experience.
Mandatory Skills
Test Management-- 3+ years
Test Planning and Estimation-- 3+ years
Salesforce --3+ years
Fundamentals Non Functional Testing-- 2+ years 
Hands-on manual and automated Functional testing --3+ years 
Database Testing --1+ years 
API Testing --2+ years 
Stakeholder Management --2+ years 
Agile Concepts --3+ years 
Working knowledge of Azure DevOps-- 2+ years 

Benefits

Why you'll love working with us 
We know that when our people are happy, they will work better and have greater work satisfaction. Here's what you can expect: 
We're all different - and we love this about us. 
We provide an inclusive, safe, and welcoming environment to all Civicans - there are heaps of opportunities to enable you to grow and be your best.

Flexible Work - Flexible work - we have the technology and tools to support you to work from home and come into our offices now and then to catch up and socialise with colleagues. 
Apply for this job - Become part of something special Do you see yourself in this role? If so, then we would love to hear from you. 
We are an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. About the job
Make an impact with NTT DATA

Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.

Your day at NTT DATA

As a Cloud Managed Services Engineer (L2) at NTT DATA, you'll play a critical role in ensuring our clients' cloud infrastructure runs smoothly. You'll proactively monitor, identify, investigate, and resolve cloud-based incidents and service requests. Applying your technical expertise, you'll handle second-line support for incidents and requests with medium complexity, ensuring we meet our service level agreements (SLAs).

Your daily activities will include monitoring work queues, resolving incidents in a timely manner, and updating tickets with the tasks performed. You'll identify and analyze issues before they impact our clients, provide second-level support, and work closely with other teams and clients to extend necessary support. Your role is vital in executing changes with identified risks and mitigation plans, ensuring the smooth operation of our clients' cloud infrastructure.

You'll also be responsible for leading client escalations for operational issues, contributing to the change management process, and ensuring all changes have proper approvals. Additionally, you'll plan and execute approved maintenance activities, audit and analyze incident tickets for quality, and produce trend analysis reports to identify tasks that can be automated, reducing ticket volumes and optimizing effort.

Collaboration is at the heart of what we do. You'll work with automation teams to optimize efforts, coach the Service desk and L1 teams on technical and behavioral skills, and establish monitoring for client infrastructure. Your proactive approach will ensure that problems and errors are identified before impacting clients, creating a positive experience throughout their journey with us.

To thrive in this role, you need to have:

Experience in Windows Server Administration, Linux Server Administration, Virtualization Administration, Server Hardware, and Storage Administration.
Moderate experience in managed services and knowledge of ticketing tools like ServiceNow.
Knowledge of management agents, redundancy concepts, and supported. technical domains like Network, DATA Center, Telephony, Exchange, Storage, Cloud, and Backup.
Strong planning skills with an ability to adapt to changing circumstances.
Ability to communicate and work effectively across different cultures and social groups.
Active listening skills, including paraphrasing and probing for further relevant information.
Positive outlook and ability to thrive in a pressurized environment.
Willingness to work longer hours when necessary and maintain a client-focused approach.
Bachelor’s degree in information technology/computing or equivalent work experience.

Workplace type: 

Hybrid Working

About NTT DATA

NTT DATA is a $30+ billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world’s leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. Our consulting and industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start-up partners. NTT DATA is part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in R&D.

Equal Opportunity Employer

NTT DATA is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer with a global culture that embraces diversity. We are committed to providing an environment free of unfair discrimination and harassment. We do not discriminate based on age, race, colour, gender, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, or any other protected category. Join our growing global team and accelerate your career with us. Apply today.

Third parties fraudulently posing as NTT DATA recruiters

NTT DATA recruiters will never ask job seekers or candidates for payment or banking information during the recruitment process, for any reason. Please remain vigilant of third parties who may attempt to impersonate NTT DATA recruiters—whether in writing or by phone—in order to deceptively obtain personal data or money from you. Trying to Apply to "Back End Developer | Cladb" job. Job ID: 4384945539
HR info was not given for "Back End Developer" with Job ID: 4384945539!

About the job
About Cladbe: The PropTech OS
We are not building another clunky real estate CRM. We are building Cladbe, the definitive PropTech Operating System designed to become the central nervous system of the industry.
The Indian real estate market is choked by fragmented tools, stale data, and massive operational leakage. We are eliminating the inefficiencies of legacy platforms by bridging the Builder's internal supply (The OS) with our unified distribution network (Property.new & Channel Partners).

Right now, we are operating out of our Bareilly "Sandbox" to finalize our MVP and harden our infrastructure before executing a massive commercial blitz in Delhi-NCR. We need a Backend Engineer to join our frozen Core Tech Lab and build the bulletproof infrastructure that will handle 10,000+ concurrent users during our high-hype "Flash Drop" sales events.
The Mission: Building the OS for Indian Real Estate
As a Core Backend Engineer, your code will be the "Source of Truth" for millions of dollars in real estate transactions. You will not view features in isolation; you will build the technical moats that create an indispensable, seamless experience for builders, brokers, and buyers.

When a sale closes in our CRM, it shouldn't just be a logged event—it must automatically trigger financial demand letters, verify construction invoices, and update the global inventory matrix. This seamless integration is what makes our OS the ultimate operational backbone.

Your Key Responsibilities:
Architect the Digital Truth: Build and scale our stateless Node.js APIs that power the core business logic of the Cladbe OS.
Command the Financial Ledger: Maintain absolute database integrity using PostgreSQL (Financial Truth) and manage our real-time Inventory Matrix with Redis.
Engineer for Extreme Concurrency: Develop zero-latency, fail-proof concurrency checks to completely eliminate the risk of double-bookings during high-volume Flash Drops.
Orchestrate Workflows: Build heavy-duty event-driven architectures and unified payout engines using Kafka, Hatchet, and RabbitMQ.
Optimize for Bare Metal: Deploy and optimize services on Bare Metal Kubernetes clusters, ensuring maximum velocity and minimal resource bloat.


What We Are Looking For
Backend: Node.js, TypeScript, Express/NestJS.
Databases: PostgreSQL (with pgvector), Firebase, DragonflyDB (Caching/Locks).
Data Structures & Graphs: Experience with graph databases (we use JanusGraph/Cassandra) is a massive plus.
Messaging & Orchestration: Kafka (Event Bus), Hatchet + RabbitMQ (Workflow Orchestration).
Observability: Familiarity with high-speed APM tracing using tools like SigNoz and ClickHouse.
Must-Have Skills:
You have hardcore backend experience building highly scalable, distributed systems.
You understand that a software crash during a real estate launch is catastrophic; you code for resilience.
You are comfortable working in a lean, hyper-focused environment in Bareilly before we scale nationwide.
You think like an entrepreneur. You understand that backend efficiency directly impacts our Flywheel of Supply, Distribution, and Demand.

Why Join Us?
Disrupt a $300B Market: We are not another aggregator. We are digitizing the supply chain of real estate.
Modern Stack, No Legacy: You won't be maintaining 10-year-old PHP code.
Founder-Level Impact: Your code will directly impact how billions of Rupees transact in the Indian market.

Experience required 10 > Current Experience 5. Skipping this job!

About the job
IMEA (India, Middle East, Africa)

India

LIXIL INDIA PVT LTD

Employee Assignment

Fully remote possible

Full Time

1 May 2025

Title

Data Engineer

Job Description

A Data Engineer is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining large-scale data systems and infrastructure. Their primary goal is to ensure that data is properly collected, stored, processed, and retrieved to support business intelligence, analytics, and data-driven decision-making.

Key Responsibilities

Design and Develop Data Pipelines: Create data pipelines to extract data from various sources, transform it into a standardized format, and load it into a centralized data repository.
Build and Maintain Data Infrastructure: Design, implement, and manage data warehouses, data lakes, and other data storage solutions.
Ensure Data Quality and Integrity: Develop data validation, cleansing, and normalization processes to ensure data accuracy and consistency.
Collaborate with Data Analysts and Business Process Owners: Work with data analysts and business process owners to understand their data requirements and provide data support for their projects.
Optimize Data Systems for Performance: Continuously monitor and optimize data systems for performance, scalability, and reliability.
Develop and Maintain Data Governance Policies: Create and enforce data governance policies to ensure data security, compliance, and regulatory requirements.

Experience & Skills

Hands-on experience in implementing, supporting, and administering modern cloud-based data solutions (Google BigQuery, AWS Redshift, Azure Synapse, Snowflake, etc.).
Strong programming skills in SQL, Java, and Python.
Experience in configuring and managing data pipelines using Apache Airflow, Informatica, Talend, SAP BODS or API-based extraction.
Expertise in real-time data processing frameworks.
Strong understanding of Git and CI/CD for automated deployment and version control.
Experience with Infrastructure-as-Code tools like Terraform for cloud resource management.
Good stakeholder management skills to collaborate effectively across teams.
Solid understanding of SAP ERP data and processes to integrate enterprise data sources.
Exposure to data visualization and front-end tools (Tableau, Looker, etc.).
Strong command of English with excellent communication skills.

About the job
Join us as a Software Engineer

This is an opportunity for a driven Software Engineer to take on an exciting new career challenge
Day-to-day, you'll build a wide network of stakeholders of varying levels of seniority
It’s a chance to hone your existing technical skills and advance your career
We're offering this role at senior analyst level

What You'll Do

In your new role, you’ll engineer and maintain innovative, customer centric, high performance, secure and robust solutions.

You’ll be working within a feature team and using your extensive experience to engineer software, scripts and tools that are often complex, as well as liaising with other engineers, architects and business analysts across the platform.

You’ll Also Be

Producing complex and critical software rapidly and of high quality which adds value to the business
Working in permanent teams who are responsible for the full life cycle, from initial development, through enhancement and maintenance to replacement or decommissioning
Collaborating to optimise our software engineering capability
Designing, producing, testing and implementing our working code
Working across the life cycle, from requirements analysis and design, through coding to testing, deployment and operations

The Skills You'll Need

You’ll need at least two years of experience in software engineering, software design, architecture, and an understanding of how your area of expertise supports our customers.

You’ll Also Need

Experience of working with development & testing tools, bug tracking tools and wikis
Expertise in ReactJS and NodeJS
Experience of DevOps, Testing and Agile methodology and associated toolsets
A background in solving highly complex, analytical and numerical problems
Experience of implementing programming best practice, especially around scalability, automation, virtualisation, optimisation, availability and performance

About the job
About Smart Working

At Smart Working, we believe your job should not only look right on paper but also feel right every day. This isn’t just another remote opportunity - it’s about finding where you truly belong, no matter where you are. From day one, you’re welcomed into a genuine community that values your growth and well-being.

Our mission is simple: to break down geographic barriers and connect skilled professionals with outstanding global teams and products for full-time, long-term roles. We help you discover meaningful work with teams that invest in your success, where you’re empowered to grow personally and professionally.
Join one of the highest-rated workplaces on Glassdoor and experience what it means to thrive in a truly remote-first world.

About the Role

We are looking for an AI Engineer / AI Agent Engineer to design, build, and deploy intelligent AI agents that solve real-world problems. This is a hands-on role suited to someone with a strong software engineering background and a passion for working with emerging AI technologies and agent-based systems.

You will work across the full stack, integrating AI models into scalable applications and experimenting with modern agent orchestration frameworks to deliver impactful, production-ready solutions.


Responsibilities

Design, develop, and deploy AI agents for real-world use cases

Build end-to-end solutions across frontend and backend systems

Integrate AI models and tools into applications and workflows

Experiment with and implement agent orchestration frameworks (e.g. LangChain, OpenAI Agent SDK)

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver AI-driven features

Continuously improve performance, scalability, and reliability of AI systems


Requirements

Solid software development experience

Full-stack development experience (e.g. React, Node.js/Express, or similar)

Strong interest in AI and agent-based systems

Experience working with AI orchestration tools (e.g. LangChain, OpenAI tools, or similar)

Hands-on experience building AI agents in a professional environment


Nice to Have

Experience deploying AI systems to production

Familiarity with modern AI APIs and tooling

Interest in staying up to date with the latest AI trends and advancements


Benefits

Fixed Shifts: 12:00 PM - 9:30 PM IST (Summer) | 1:00 PM - 10:30 PM IST (Winter)

No Weekend Work: Real work-life balance, not just words

Day 1 Benefits: Laptop and full medical insurance provided

Support That Matters:Mentorship, community, and forums where ideas are shared

True Belonging: A long-term career where your contributions are valued




At Smart Working, you’ll never be just another remote hire.

Be a Smart Worker - valued, empowered, and part of a culture that celebrates integrity, excellence, and ambition.

If that sounds like your kind of place, we’d love to hear your story. 


We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

About the job
About Us
At Neuracore, we're building the world's first robot learning cloud service (https://github.com/NeuracoreAI/neuracore).
Our platform eliminates the complexity of traditional robotics development by providing a complete end-to-end solution for data collection, model training, and deployment that works across different robot types and configurations.

Our multidisciplinary team is at the forefront of making robot learning accessible to organisations worldwide, from manufacturing and logistics to healthcare and research institutions. We're transforming how robotics teams develop, train, and deploy intelligent systems by providing cloud-native infrastructure that scales from small research projects to enterprise-wide robot fleets.

About the Role
We are seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to implement and integrate cutting-edge AI systems for robotics applications. You'll research and implement advanced learning algorithms, build scalable data pipelines, and translate breakthrough research into production systems. This role offers the opportunity to work on foundation models for robotics, multi-embodiment learning, and the infrastructure that will accelerate robotics development across industries.

Key Responsibilities
Translate research to production by implementing state-of-the-art algorithms from top-tier conferences into deployed systems
Train deep learning models that handle multi-modal sensor data from different robot configurations and manufacturers

Utilise existing training infrastructure leveraging multi-GPU systems and distributed computing for large-scale model training
Create experimentation frameworks for large-scale evaluation and testing of robot learning approaches

Required Skills
Advanced degree (PhD, Master's, or equivalent experience) in Computer Science, Robotics, Machine Learning, or related field
Deep ML expertise in PyTorch or TensorFlow with experience in distributed training and optimisation
Robotics learning experience with practical knowledge of reinforcement learning and/or imitation learning
Production software skills with ability to build scalable, maintainable systems beyond research prototypes
Cloud infrastructure experience with platforms like AWS, GCP, or Azure and containerisation technologies

Preferred Skills
Multi-robot systems experience and cross-embodiment learning approaches
MLOps expertise including experiment tracking, model versioning, and deployment pipelines
Computer vision and sensor fusion for robotics applications
Real-world deployment experience with robot data collection and production model serving
Robotics middleware experience with ROS/ROS2 or similar frameworks
Familiarity with simulation environments and synthetic data generation

About the job
Software Development Engineer (Fresher)admin2026-03-21T18:18:55+05:30

Job Description

About Us Welcome to Associative, a fast-growing software development firm headquartered in Pune, Maharashtra. Established in 2021, we are a team of dedicated innovators and IT professionals passionate about transforming visionary ideas into scalable digital realities. We are proud to be an Adobe Silver Solution Partner, an Adobe Certified Reseller, and an Official Reseller Partner of Strapi.

At Associative, we work across a massive landscape of cutting-edge technologies—spanning Web and Mobile App Development, AI & Machine Learning, Blockchain & Web3, Game Development (AR/VR), and specialized Enterprise Solutions.

The Role We are seeking a passionate and talented Software Development Engineer to join our growing team. This is a fantastic opportunity for a motivated fresher to kickstart their career in a dynamic, multi-disciplinary tech environment.

Qualifications & Requirements

Experience: Fresher
Education: Any Graduate
Languages: Must be fluent in Hindi, English, and Marathi
Equipment: Must have your own laptop for work

What We Offer

Employment Type: Full-time, Permanent
Work Location: Onsite at our Pune office (Khandve Complex, Lohegaon)
Work Schedule: Monday through Saturday
Office Hours: 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM

Important Information (Please Read Before Applying) To Ensure Clarity And Manage Expectations, Please Review The Following Key Points Regarding This Position And Our Hiring Process

Eligibility: This position is exclusively for candidates ready to join a full-time role. It is not intended for individuals currently pursuing their education or any full-time courses.
Work Model: This is a strictly full-time, in-office position. We do not offer remote work, work-from-home, or part-time arrangements.
Interview Format: All interviews are conducted in person. Virtual or online interviews are not available for this role.
